headline: Google Brings Gemini To Mac In Early Test To Rival ChatGPT
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google is stepping up its AI push with a dedicated Gemini app for Apple Inc.’s Macs. Gemini App Signals Push Beyond Web AI Google is accelerating development of a dedicated Gemini AI app for the Mac lineup to compete more directly with OpenAI and Anthropic. The company has begun privately testing an early version with select users, gathering feedback and identifying bugs ahead of a wider release. headline: Does Life360's Slower User Growth vs Stronger FY26 Guidance Reframe Its Ad-Driven Strategy (ASX:360)?
summary: Earlier in March 2026, Citi analyst Siraj Ahmed reaffirmed a positive stance on Life360 while flagging that first-quarter guidance implies monthly active user growth below 20% amid intensifying competition. At the same time, Life360 issued FY26 revenue and adjusted EBITDA guidance that edges past consensus, helped by stronger-than-expected advertising contributions from the Nativo acquisition. We'll now examine how concerns about slower near-term user growth, despite slightly stronger...

summary: The derivatives give users synthetic exposure to major U.S. equities while using Bitcoin and other crypto holdings as collateral, with plans to expand into tokenized assets later this year.

headline: Kastle Delivers Industry First: Mobile Credential Standardization Across Apple, Google, and Samsung at Enterprise Scale
summary: Kastle, a leading provider of managed physical security services, announced today that it is the first company to roll out Aliro 1.0 credentials across mobile wallets of Apple, Google, and Samsung. This milestone makes Kastle the first to certify a fully interoperable credential standard across all three platforms, helping to accelerate widespread adoption of mobile access.

content.title: Kastle Delivers Industry First: Mobile Credential Standardization Across Apple, Google, and Samsung at Enterprise Scale
content.summary: Kastle, a leading provider of managed physical security services, announced today that it is the first company to roll out Aliro 1.0 credentials across mobile wallets of Apple, Google, and Samsung. This milestone makes Kastle the first to certify a fully interoperable credential standard across all three platforms, helping to accelerate widespread adoption of mobile access.

headline: Memory Is Wall Street’s Favorite Tech Trade as Mag 7 Disappoints
summary: (Bloomberg) -- In the stock market’s volatile and uncertain start to the year, one trade has held strong: go long memory and storage.Companies like Sandisk Corp., Western Digital Corp., and Seagate Technology Holdings Plc are among the leaders in the S&P 500 Index in 2026, even with their recent declines, as heavy spending on artificial intelligence creates insatiable demand for memory and storage components used in data centers. headline: Roblox’s Hit Game ‘Steal A Brainrot’ Battles Its Many Imitators
summary: (Bloomberg) -- In the popular video game Steal A Brainrot, the object is petty theft. But now that the internet is awash with knockoffs of the runaway Roblox Corp. hit, its makers are defending their turf.Since November, Steal A Brainrot developers Spyder Games and Speedy Simulator Gaming have filed at least four lawsuits against alleged imposters. In one case, a legal representative knocked on the door of the listed address for Bella Thomas, the owner of the website stealbrainrotio.io that host

headline: Power and Paradox: Value of Leading US Brands Rises to $6.44 Trillion as Global Trust Weakens
summary: WASHINGTON, March 24, 2026--The U.S. remains the world’s most powerful brand market in 2026, with the nation’s top 500 brands valued at USD6.44 trillion, up 10% year-on-year, according to a recent report by Brand Finance.

headline: Apple to bring paid ads to maps to US, Canada this summer
summary: Apple on Tuesday said it plans to introduce paid ads to its maps service in the U.S. and Canada this summer, marking its entry ‌into a business long dominated by Alphabet's Google.  Apple Maps, an app that comes bundled on hundreds ‌of millions of iPhones and other devices each year, will display paid advertising on top of existing organic search results.  Advertisers will ​be able to claim their physical location through a set of business tools, which Apple also said Tuesday it plans to revamp next month.

content.title: Apple to bring paid ads to maps to US, Canada this summer

Advertisers will ​be able to claim their physical location through a set of business tools, which Apple also said Tuesday it plans to revamp next month.
